item.title: Ep. 52. LIVE FROM BOULDER!!
item.itunes:title: Ep. 52. LIVE FROM BOULDER!!
item.description:
Welcome Back!

The Boulder Boys Show Ep. 52

WE ARE LIVE! We hosted our first group run and live pod with the help of Intrepid Camp Gear. We chat about Moi's major life change, DNS vs. DNF, and field some listener questions.  Thanks for listening! 

This Episode is brought to you by Intrepid Camp Gear.

Welcome to The Boulder Boys Show Ep. 1.

In this episode we give a little introduction and why we decided to start a podcast.  We also talk about the sometimes unglamorous side of sponsorship negotiations and what we have coming up on our race calendars.  Thanks for tuning in!

Any suggestions or topics you'd love to hear?  Let us know!
